# 📚 Learning Buddy

Offline AI Learning Assistant built using Flask

## ✨ Features
- Learn Mode (AI explanation)
- Bloom's Taxonomy learning levels
- Quiz generator
- Notes summarizer
- Progress tracking with badges 🏆

## 🛠️ Tech Stack
- Python Flask
- SQLite
- Ollama AI (Gemma3)

## ▶️ How to Run
pip install flask requests  
python app.py
